news-global-econ.description:
It is not clear who will run the Fed after the expiration of Powell's term if the Senate has not confirmed Kevin Warsh.

news-global-econ.title: Election Integrity: Javier Milei Proposes Total Overhaul of Argentina's Voting System
news-global-econ.description:
The government of Argentine President Javier Milei on Wednesday submitted a bill to Congress aiming to overhaul the nation's elections — urging the need to "fix a system that is fundamentally flawed" and make it more transparent and less costly.

news-global-econ.title: GOP infighting erupts over immigration bill that would shield millions from deportation
news-global-econ.description: House Republicans are sharply divided over the Dignity Act immigration bill, with some calling it "mass amnesty" and others urging Trump to act on immigration reform.

news-global-econ.title: Harvard students revolt over new grading policy they call ‘racist’
news-global-econ.description: Students at Harvard launched a petition calling a proposed grading reform "racist," saying it would compound disadvantages for marginalized students.

news-global-soc.title: Mayor Calls Out 'Thugs' over Shooting in Baton Rouge Mall
news-global-soc.description:
Baton Rouge Mayor Sid Edwards (R) called out "thugs" who opened fire in the Mall of Louisiana Thursday and left 1 person dead and 9 wounded. 
The post Mayor Calls Out ‘Thugs’ over Shooting in Baton Rouge Mall appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-soc.title: Trump praises ousted Navy Secretary Phelan amid tensions with Pentagon leadership
news-global-soc.description: Sources say Navy Secretary John Phelan was removed after months of tensions with Pentagon leaders over shipbuilding programs and chain-of-command issues.

news-global-soc.title: Nuclear experts warn Iran’s uranium ‘right’ is a myth, say Trump is right to hold firm
news-global-soc.description: Experts say the U.S. must permanently ban Iran's uranium enrichment program, warning Tehran could resume its nuclear weapons path if infrastructure stays.

news-global-soc.title: A piece of the UFC White House event’s setup is sitting in Pennsylvania Amish country
news-global-soc.description: UFC Freedom 250's massive stage structure called The Claw is being assembled in Pennsylvania Amish country near Lititz before moving to the White House.
